overview: LinguaTube is a mobile-first English learning app inspired by YouTube and Duolingo. Watch long-form videos with dual English and translated subtitles, save vocabulary, take quizzes, and track your progress on the leaderboard.
features: Video player with dual subtitles (English + Uzbek/Russian)
Persistent login with email/password and simulated Google login
Top Users leaderboard with ranks, points, and streaks
